nasb.text: The king said to Haman, “The silver is yours, and the people also, to do with them as you please.”

esv.text: And the king said to Haman, “The money is given to you, the people also, to do with them as it seems good to you.”

cnv.text: 王對哈曼說：“這銀子仍賜給你，這民也交給你，你看怎樣好，就怎樣待他們吧。”

ccb.text: 对他说：“这些银子归你，这个民族也交给你，随你处置。”
